checks.name: Wrapper normalization detects BlueEdge wrapper
checks.detail: structural_scanner.py detects blueedge-platform as wrapper, produces 11 clusters instead of 1

checks.name: Wrapper normalization does not trigger for FastAPI
checks.detail: FastAPI has no wrapper directory. 19 clusters produced (unchanged from prior behavior)

checks.name: A.5 path-prefix reconstruction produces meaningful domains
checks.detail: 48 domains from 945 nodes. Includes backend_src_common, backend_src_config, backend_src_events, backend_src_health, backend_src_modules — matching reference artifact grouping pattern

checks.name: Deterministic: Run 1 == Run 2 (dom_layer)
checks.detail: Two independent runs produce bit-identical dom_layer.json (excluding generated_at, run_id, client)

checks.name: Deterministic: Run 1 == Run 2 (40.4 topology)
checks.detail: Two independent runs produce bit-identical canonical_topology.json (excluding generated_at, run_id, client_id, source_id)

checks.name: Lane isolation: A.5 does not mutate Lane A artifacts
checks.detail: dom_layer_generator.py reads structure/ (40.2, 40.4) and writes dom/ only. No structure/ modification.

checks.name: Orchestrator compatibility: all dom_groups fields preserved
checks.detail: dom_id, dom_label, included_nodes, derivation_rule, path_patterns all present in A.5 output

checks.name: Orchestrator hardcoded references removed
checks.detail: run_client_pipeline.py vault construction reads domain count and method from dom_layer.json dynamically. No hardcoded 35/13/BlueEdge.

checks.name: Full pipeline: all 9 phases PASS
checks.detail: run_blueedge_a5_validation_01: Phase 1-9 all PASS. Vault readiness 9/9.

checks.name: Integration validation: 12/12 checks PASS
checks.detail: integration_validation_generator.py: all checks pass including node_count_consistency, dom_node_coverage

checks.name: LENS selector restored after validation
checks.detail: Selector restored to run_be_orchestrated_fixup_01 after Phase 9 validation

checks.name: No BlueEdge-specific exceptions in modified scripts
checks.detail: structural_scanner.py, dom_layer_generator.py, run_client_pipeline.py — grep confirms zero BlueEdge-specific conditional logic
